pgeLoader.geometryRequirements: default scene; triangle-list primitives with POSITION data
pgeLoader.transformPolicy: PGE applies glTF node transforms, then the URDF visual assetToLink transform
pgeLoader.multiVisualLinkPolicy: every visual has a unique asset ID within its link; PGE aggregates all generated assets into one physical-link candidate

links.reviewStatus: candidate only; human review and scene-specific validation required
